name: cisco_secure_client
explanation: Cisco Secure Client (formerly AnyConnect) is a logs-only vendor security tile. The spec defines only a `logs` template (tcp/udp syslog with a `<PORT>` placeholder and an AnyConnect-specific `log_processing_rules` filter) and there is no Agent check class under `datadog_checks/cisco_secure_client/` (only `__init__.py` exposing `__version__`). Logs are sourced from the upstream Cisco firewall (FTD/Meraki/ASA) with syslog forwarded to the Agent. There is no metrics endpoint to probe, no upstream host/port for the Agent to autodiscover, and the listener port is operator policy.
notes: Pattern N (logs-only). No check.py exists; integration is a logs config + manifest only.
